Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=demethylmacrocin + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = macrocin + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:17573, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789, ChEBI:CHEBI:76819, ChEBI:CHEBI:76820; EC=2.1.1.102; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:3170602};
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: O-methyltransferase that catalyzes the conversion of demethylmacrocin to macrocin, the penultimate step of tylosin antibiotic biosynthesis. Also able to mediate the conversion of demethyllactenocin to lactenocin. {ECO:0000269|PubMed:10220165, ECO:0000269|PubMed:10510490, ECO:0000269|PubMed:3170602}.
